posts.text:
You are using the wrong word...the admin is deadly serious and has a focus and ambition I have not seen...you just do not like it. I get it...but do not underrate the intentionality.


Maine (@TheMaineWonk)

The first sit down interview the President of United States grants after launching his regime change War in Iran is with Jake Paul. 

We are not a serious country.
This is not a serious administration. 

You don’t hate this timeline enough.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/TheMaineWonk/st

See the game of lawfare


NBC News (@NBCNews)

BREAKING: Federal judge blocks subpoenas against Fed Chair Jerome Powell, saying the DOJ has produced 'essentially zero evidence.' nbcnews.com/business/economy…




— https://nitter.net/NBCNews/status/2032537709210661200#m

Matters. Maga why is this ok?


Citizens for Ethics (@CREWcrew)

Trump announced Jared Kushner as Special Peace Envoy on February 19th.

That means Kushner only has 8 more days to file his legally required public financial disclosure report. The public needs to understand his financial entanglements. 
citizensforethics.org/legal-…




— https://nitter.net/CREWcrew/status/2032411580621611299#m
offset the negative with positive...match energy and create a critical thinking space. Science says so: instagram.com/reel/DVy2RiKjX…

Marines are being sent to the Middle East...a sign of better or worse to come?

Video

It's time for one more show of Cuomo warnings on Cuomo Mornings @siriusXM from the Middle East before I head home.  I want to hear what you have to say given the current state of play.

Call In - 866-967-6887

Wasnt israel. Stop trying to play gotcha


Allison Troskie (@AllisonTroskie)

Chris, Americas do not need a visa to visit Israel. They need an online ETA for a 90 day entry. Having said that, Nancy is doing some good work, but she needs less of her PR!



— https://nitter.net/AllisonTroskie/status/2032144411237499126#m

Does maga really think that worries abt collapsing the energy market and increasing terror at home means people want America to lose? What a stupid piece of sophistry


Scott Jennings (@ScottJenningsKY)

To anyone cheering against American success in Iran after nearly 50 years of them terrorizing the world:

I don't understand your vibe at all.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/ScottJenningsKY/status/2032196327518441781#m

The war has a new battleground in Iran and at home:

Video

Just stating some facts


Nancy Mace (@NancyMace)

You were there. And thank you for your help in Jordan. 🇺🇸



— https://nitter.net/NancyMace/status/2032112574028828731#m

Reporting from Israel, I explain why much of the world is misunderstanding the Iran war and how it looks very different from inside the region.
